title: xuarezia frutescens
intro: Xuarezia frutescens, also known as Mexican tea or yerba de la tristeza, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, Xuarezia frutescens has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Xuarezia frutescens is often used as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although the optimal preparation methods and dosages remain unclear.
